title: X-Force Fire Bots Transforming Robot Toy Set, Fire Brigade Truck, Ages 3+
features: TRANSFORMING TOY: X-Force Fire Bots combines a fire brigade truck that transforms into an action-packed robot figure for versatile play
COMPLETE SET: Includes a transformable fire truck, robot figure, and multiple accessories for enhanced play value
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 years and above, offering safe and engaging play experiences
THEME FOCUSED: Fire brigade rescue theme encourages imaginative role-play and storytelling adventures
INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Features moving parts and transformation mechanics that help develop fine motor skills whilst playing
description: Product Description Ignite your child's imagination with this X-Force Fire Bots transforming robot toy set! This exciting collection features a detailed fire brigade truck that transforms into an action-packed robot figure, complete with rescue accessories. The set includes a red and blue fire truck with realistic details, a transforming robot figure with striking red and white colours, and additional emergency response equipment. Perfect for children aged 3 and above, this toy combines the thrill of emergency vehicles with the excitement of robot transformation play. The sturdy construction ensures hours of imaginative play as children create their own rescue missions and adventures. The set offers multiple play possibilities, from rolling the truck along to creating dramatic rescue scenarios with the transformed robot. Each piece is sized appropriately for small hands while maintaining impressive detail that young fire-fighting enthusiasts will love. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts.
